requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documents
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Indonesia normally need transport documentation built around UN Manual of Tests and Criteria section 38.3, including a UN 38.3 test summary, classification, packing instructions, safety data, state-of-charge controls where applicable, and carrier-specific dangerous-goods documents for air, sea, or multimodal shipment. Indonesian import acceptance does not remove the separate obligations imposed by international transport rules and carriers.
summary.zh: 运往印度尼西亚的锂电芯和电池通常需要以《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3节为核心准备运输文件，包括UN 38.3测试概要、分类、包装指令、安全资料、适用时的荷电状态控制，以及航空、海运或多式联运承运人要求的危险货物文件。印尼进口接受不免除国际运输规则和承运人施加的独立义务。
summary.zht: 運往印尼的鋰電芯和電池通常需要以《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節為核心準備運輸文件，包括UN 38.3測試概要、分類、包裝指令、安全資料、適用時的荷電狀態控制，以及航空、海運或多式聯運承運人要求的危險貨物文件。印尼進口接受不免除國際運輸規則和承運人施加的獨立義務。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods classification for lithium cells and batteries
Carrier and mode-specific dangerous-goods requirements for air and sea transport

summary.en: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports address energy-storage battery safety, not dangerous-goods transport classification. A China safety report should be paired with a valid UN 38.3 test summary and shipment documents.
summary.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告覆盖储能电池安全，而非危险货物运输分类。中国安全报告应与有效UN 38.3测试概要和运输文件配套使用。
summary.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告覆蓋儲能電池安全，而非危險貨物運輸分類。中國安全報告應與有效UN 38.3測試概要和運輸文件配套使用。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3

gap.en: The gap is transport evidence, not product design alone. Exporters should prepare the UN 38.3 test summary, dangerous-goods declaration where required, packing evidence, battery handling instructions, emergency contact details, and shipping labels or marks before booking transport to Indonesia.
gap.zh: 差距在于运输证据，而不只是产品设计。出口商在订舱运往印尼前，应准备UN 38.3测试概要、适用时的危险货物申报、包装证据、电池操作说明、应急联系方式以及运输标签或标记。
gap.zht: 差距在於運輸證據，而不只是產品設計。出口商在訂艙運往印尼前，應準備UN 38.3測試概要、適用時的危險貨物申報、包裝證據、電池操作說明、應急聯絡方式以及運輸標籤或標記。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where applicable under international mode and carrier rules used for shipment to Indonesia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where lithium batteries are shipped as dangerous goods; China GB battery safety standards do not replace UN 38.3 transport evidence

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods shipping documents separate from BESS product-safety files. GB 44240 or GB/T 36276 evidence alone is not a transport clearance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将UN 38.3及危险货物运输文件与BESS产品安全文件分开管理。仅有GB 44240或GB/T 36276证据并不是运输放行资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將UN 38.3及危險貨物運輸文件與BESS產品安全文件分開管理。僅有GB 44240或GB/T 36276證據並不是運輸放行資料包。
